text: An Ohio trial court sanctioned pro se litigant Xingkui Guo $100 (2025-08-11) for citing five fabricated/mis-cited cases that the court found "appear to be the result of AI-generated hallucinations." On appeal, Guo admitted the mis-citations resulted from his use of the Chinese AI platform "Deepseek." The Sixth District Court of Appeals affirmed on 2026-05-26 (Guo v. Meade Motorcars, L.L.C., 2026-Ohio-1930), rejecting Guo’s motion to set aside the sanction.
canonical_source_conflicted: Genuine Ohio case law (cases cited did not exist at the given citations)
mitigation_gap: No verification of AI-generated authorities before filing.
reliance_or_harm: Fabricated citations submitted on appeal; $100 monetary sanction imposed.
